info.title: Jejak API
info.description: Contract-first business API for consent-bound settlement receivable financing.

tags.name: Ingestions
tags.description: Private object ingestion status and quality.

tags.name: Claims
tags.description: Claim analysis, control, issuance, and funding lifecycle.

tags.name: Settlement
tags.description: Settlement, waterfall, pause, and resolution commands.

post.summary: Create a seller and record consent
Create a sandbox or production marketplace connector
Enqueue marketplace ingestion
Submit a previously authorized CSV object for ingestion
post.description: The request carries a private storage object key and content hash, never raw CSV content.

get.summary: Read ingestion status and quality report

post.summary: Create a claim from an unencumbered settlement stream

get.summary: List authorized claims with cursor pagination

post.summary: Freeze a decision snapshot and request evaluation
Submit control evidence metadata and hash
Verify, reject, or revoke claim control
Create a financing offer
Accept the exact hashed financing terms
Authorize on-chain issuance
Fund an accepted facility position
Ingest a verified settlement event
Calculate realized claim position
Execute a guarded settlement waterfall
Open, update, or close an authorized resolution
Trigger a claim-level circuit breaker

get.summary: Search the append-only tenant audit log

post.summary: Invite an institutional member into the selected tenant
Preview a valid invitation without exposing its token
Accept an invitation using the authenticated matching email
Revoke a pending institutional invitation

bearerAuth.description: Supabase access token. Authorization is resolved from backend memberships, not JWT user metadata.

credentialHandle.description: Opaque handle; never a raw credential.

RequestId.description: UUIDv7 request identifier used for support and tracing.

Sandbox.description: Whether this response was produced using sandbox behavior.

InternalError.description: Unexpected server failure with no sensitive implementation details.

Forbidden.description: The authenticated actor lacks the required tenant, role, or object permission.

NotFound.description: The requested resource does not exist or is not visible to the actor.

PreconditionFailed.description: Aggregate version or domain precondition did not match.

TenantId.name: X-Jejak-Tenant-Id
TenantId.description: Explicit active tenant selected by the authenticated actor.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Stable caller-generated key; replaying the same key and payload returns the original result.

IfMatch.name: If-Match
IfMatch.description: Decimal aggregate version expected by the caller.
